#  `r Variable` {.tabset}

## Summary Statistics 

```{r, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE}
   AirQuality |> 
    select(!!as.symbol(Variable)) |> 
    summarise(Minimum = min(!!as.symbol(Variable), na.rm = TRUE),
              First_Quartile = quantile(!!as.symbol(Variable), probs = c(0.25), na.rm = TRUE),
              Median = median(!!as.symbol(Variable), na.rm = TRUE),
              Mean = round(mean(!!as.symbol(Variable), na.rm = TRUE), digits = 1),
              Third_Quartile = quantile(!!as.symbol(Variable), probs = c(0.75), na.rm = TRUE),
              Maximum = max(!!as.symbol(Variable), na.rm = TRUE),
              Number_Missing = sum(is.na(!!as.symbol(Variable)))) |> 
    ungroup() |> 
     kable() |> 
     kable_styling(bootstrap = "bordered")
```

## Distribution
```{r, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE}
DistData <- AirQuality |> 
  select(!!as.symbol(Variable)) |> 
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(!!as.symbol(Variable)))

plot_univariate <- function(data, var, binwidth = NULL) {
  x_vals <- data[[var]]
  
  # Auto binwidth using Freedman-Diaconis rule if not provided
  if (is.null(binwidth)) {
    binwidth <- 2 * IQR(x_vals, na.rm = TRUE) / length(x_vals)^(1/3)
  }
  
  ggplot(data, aes(x = .data[[var]])) +
    geom_histogram(
      aes(y = after_stat(density)),
      binwidth  = binwidth,
      fill      = "#4E79A7",
      color     = "white",
      linewidth = 0.3,
      alpha     = 0.8
    ) +
    geom_density(
      color     = "#E15759",
      linewidth = 1,
      adjust    = 1.2
    ) +
    geom_rug(
      alpha  = 0.4,
      length = unit(0.03, "npc"),
      color  = "#4E79A7"
    ) +
    labs(
      title    = paste("Distribution of", var),
      subtitle = sprintf(
        "n = %d  |  mean = %.2f  |  median = %.2f  |  sd = %.2f",
        sum(!is.na(x_vals)),
        mean(x_vals, na.rm = TRUE),
        median(x_vals, na.rm = TRUE),
        sd(x_vals, na.rm = TRUE)
      ),
      x = var,
      y = "Density"
    ) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
    theme(
      plot.title    = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(color = "grey50", size = 10),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
    )
}


plot_univariate(DistData, Variable)
```

```{r, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE}
plot_bivariate <- function(data, x_var, y_var, smooth = TRUE, bins = 60) {
  
  data <- data[!is.na(data[[x_var]]) & !is.na(data[[y_var]]), ]
  
  x_vals <- as.numeric(as.character(data[[x_var]]))
  y_vals <- as.numeric(as.character(data[[y_var]]))
  
  cor_val <- cor(x_vals, y_vals)
  
  p <- ggplot(data, aes(x = .data[[x_var]], y = .data[[y_var]])) +
    geom_hex(
      bins  = bins,
      alpha = 0.9
    ) +
    scale_fill_viridis_c(
      option = "magma",
      name   = "count",
      labels = scales::comma
    )
  
  if (smooth) {
    p <- p + geom_smooth(
      method    = "lm",           # loess is too slow at 500k, lm is better here
      formula   = y ~ x,
      color     = "white",
      linewidth = 1,
      se        = FALSE
    )
  }
  
  p +
    labs(
      title    = paste(y_var, "vs", x_var),
      subtitle = sprintf(
        "n = %s  |  r = %.2f  |  x̄ = %.2f  |  ȳ = %.2f",
        scales::comma(nrow(data)),
        cor_val,
        mean(x_vals),
        mean(y_vals)
      ),
      x = x_var,
      y = y_var
    ) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
    theme(
      plot.title       = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
      plot.subtitle    = element_text(color = "grey50", size = 10),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      legend.position  = "right"
    )
}

```


## NO2
```{r, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE}
plot_bivariate(AirQuality, Variable, "no2")

```

## O3
```{r, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE}
plot_bivariate(AirQuality, Variable, "o3")

```

## PM10
```{r, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE}
plot_bivariate(AirQuality, Variable, "pm10")

```
